article_title: Asustek posts record NT$44.6 billion profit in 2025, server revenue to double in 1Q26

article_title: IDF Spokesman: 'Your AI is as stupid as you are'
summary_v1: IDF Arabic spokesperson Avichay Adraee has denounced a Hezbollah video of a missile strike in Israel as a digital forgery. Adraee also made a personal attack on Hezbollah, calling their AI "as stupid as you are". The Israeli military is accusing Hezbollah of spreading false information. The authenticity of the video is being disputed.

summary_v1: UMC and HyperLight are partnering to mass-produce TFLN photonics chiplets. The goal is to improve data transmission speeds in AI computing clusters and data centers. Thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN) chiplets are a key technology in this partnership. The partnership aims to address the growing demand for faster data transmission in data centers. The TFLN photonics chiplets are expected to improve data transmission speeds.

summary_v1: The Bharat Survey for EdTech has found that digital access is widespread in India, but technology understanding is lacking.
